{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"duration_ms":214120,"duration_api_ms":197669,"num_turns":26,"result":"Phase 5 완료. 주요 변경사항:

1. **LiveActivityService** — `filterAndSort` + `computeIndices` 로직 분리, 시간 있는 일정만 필터/정렬/최대 10개 제한
2. **TicLiveActivityView** — 전면 재작성: progress line (실선/점선 + 컬러 dots), "지금/다음" 라벨, 상황별 카운트다운 (진행중/다음일정/빈시간/종료후 숨김), DI expanded/compact/minimal 뷰
3. **ContentView** — 30분 제한 필터 제거 (오늘 전체 일정 전달), `endAll()` 자동 호출 제거 (유저 수동 종료)","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"52bc70a2-0020-4848-bdd2-9baa7a09b9e3","total_cost_usd":0.921947,"usage":{"input_tokens":7699,"cache_creation_input_tokens":34347,"cache_read_input_tokens":700762,"output_tokens":10691,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":34347},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001":{"inputTokens":10,"outputTokens":2492,"cacheReadInputTokens":14260,"cacheCreationInputTokens":29785,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.05112725,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000},"claude-opus-4-6[1m]":{"inputTokens":7699,"outputTokens":10691,"cacheReadInputTokens":700762,"cacheCreationInputTokens":34347,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.8708197499999999,"contextWindow":1000000,"maxOutputTokens":64000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"a88c2c04-b0f6-416a-b9a6-aeb2421a1270"}
